nasb.text: He who keeps the law is a discerning son, But he who is a companion of gluttons humiliates his father.

esv.text: The one who keeps the law is a son with understanding, but a companion of gluttons shames his father.

cnv.text: 謹守訓誨的，是聰明的人； 與貪食的人作伴的，卻使父親蒙羞。

ccb.text: 遵守律法的是智慧之子， 与贪食者为伍令父蒙羞。

csbs.text: 谨守律法的，是有悟性之子； 结交贪食者的，使他的父亲受辱。
